Package org.eventb.internal.core.seqprover.reasonerInputs

Class PFunSetInput

java.lang.Object
org.eventb.core.seqprover.reasonerInputs.SingleExprInput
org.eventb.internal.core.seqprover.reasonerInputs.PFunSetInput
All Implemented Interfaces:
IReasonerInput, ITranslatableReasonerInput
public class PFunSetInput extends SingleExprInput
Input for reasoners that use an expression denoting a set of partial functions.
